bio.title: About Me
bio.content:
I am a Fullstack Developer with extensive experience in building web applications from the ground up. I handle everything from user interface design to backend implementation, ensuring high-quality code and delivering solutions that exceed client expectations.

My passion for programming started in childhood, and since then, I have continuously honed my skills, embracing new technologies and best practices to stay at the forefront of software development.

main_projects.title: Key Projects
main_projects.content:
In addition to developing simpler websites, such as this portfolio (https://adeir.me), I have created comprehensive systems for business process management, helping companies streamline and automate their operations. Industries I have worked with include dispatch services, real estate agencies, occupational safety consultancies, and local retail businesses.

I have also contributed to public sector projects, ranging from municipal websites to applications for managing and tracking public lighting infrastructure.

idioms.title: Languages
idioms.content: I am fluent in English and Spanish and have intermediate knowledge of Japanese.

projects.no_readme: This project does not yet have a detailed description (README.md) available in the GitHub repository.

reading_list.title: Reading List
reading_list.content:
I am an avid reader, and whenever I come across exceptional books, I make a note of them to share with others. This reading list contains my current favorite books, organized by category. I consider these must-reads for anyone looking to grow personally or professionally.

Note: This page contains affiliate links. If you make a purchase through these links, I may receive a small commission at no additional cost to you.
